# reset

w 54 0F 01

#Inner Setting Export Result From GUI setting
w 54 1B BD
w 54 23 1A
w 54 04 9E
w 54 05 02
w 54 76 0F
w 54 82 00 00 00 F0
w 54 85 00 00 00 06
w 54 86 00 00 30 06
w 54 94 00 00 00 11
w 54 95 40 00 32 10
w 54 96 10 00 00 6C
w 54 B0 00 00 07 FF
w 54 19 15
w 54 10 77

# WARNING: KEEP THESE VALUES. See: QUASARSYS-1172
w 54 11 00
w 54 12 06
w 54 13 0C
w 54 14 12

w 54 8E 01 00 00
w 54 8F 7F F8 00
w 54 90 01 00 00
w 54 91 7F F0 00
w 54 92 01 00 00
w 54 93 7F F0 00
w 54 6D 01 00 00
w 54 6E 7F F9 00
w 54 79 00 00 00 F0
w 54 8B 30
w 54 8C 18
w 54 00 1A
w 54 15 10
w 54 1E 05
w 54 20 00
w 54 5F 27 00 00 27
w 54 16 06
w 54 21 00
w 54 1F 03

#mute and enable I2C access to EQ
w 54 06 08
w 54 22 30
w 54 03 5F

# Export the EQ DRC setting From GUI setting

# EQ & SPEQ enable control
w 54 25 FF
w 54 26 FF
w 54 27 FF
w 54 28 FF
w 54 29 F0
w 54 2A 00
w 54 2B 00

# EQ Bqs Parameter
w 54 2F FC 25 39 91 07 DA 16 0A 06 39 28 AE F3 8D AE A5 06 39 28 AE
w 54 30 FC 25 39 91 07 DA 16 0A 03 ED 37 1E F8 25 91 C4 03 ED 37 1E
w 54 31 FC 25 39 91 07 DA 16 0A 03 ED 37 1E F8 25 91 C4 03 ED 37 1E
w 54 32 FC 0E 6F 69 07 F0 87 13 03 F6 80 00 F8 0F 78 ED 03 FB 10 97
w 54 33 FE 95 D9 3C 05 20 96 AC 01 14 77 7C FA DF 69 54 04 55 AF 49
w 54 34 FC F3 6B 3F 06 AC CF EC 03 39 7F 3F F9 53 30 15 03 D3 15 82
w 54 35 FD 7F 54 80 06 25 F4 32 01 24 C7 A0 FD 01 C7 92 02 34 28 1D
w 54 36 FE C2 FE 13 03 7D D3 AA 02 D7 3D 19 F8 2A 0C CC 06 BD E4 5F

# DRC Bqs Parameter
w 54 47 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00

# Loudnessgain
w 54 57 40 00 00 00 40 00 00 00 40 00 00 00

# DRC Settings
w 54 61 3C C2 A3
w 54 62 00 44 44
w 54 63 00 01 23
w 54 64 3C C3 0C
w 54 65 00 44 44
w 54 66 00 01 23
w 54 67 3C C3 0C
w 54 68 00 44 44
w 54 69 00 01 23
w 54 6A 00 03 0A
w 54 6B 00 44 44
w 54 6C 00 01 23
w 54 60 00 00 08 01

# checksum
w 54 9A 08 F7 F1 1A
w 54 9B 40 00 00 00
w 54 9C 08 F7 F1 1A

#Disable I2C access to EQ
w 54 03 5E

# Set Master Volume and Channel Volume
w 54 07 FF
w 54 08 9F
w 54 09 9F
w 54 0B 00

# Set Prescaler and Postscaler
w 54 2C E5 55
w 54 2D 7F FF

# Set Monitor 0
w 54 17 90

# Unmute
w 54 22 00
w 54 06 00
